name: golang-boost
description: Single-skill Claude Code plugin teaching AI agents how to write and review Go code on top of github.com/xgodev/boost — Iron Laws (boost.Start, log.FromContext, config.Add, model/errors), HTTP APIs with Echo, event-driven functions over Pub/Sub/NATS/Kafka, and the maintainer-side layout convention for new factory contribs / wrapper drivers / bootstrap adapters.
